description: M14: Append flow (3-way consent), manual merge (UUID/URL), recursive merge (co-owner demotion), old idea refs, merge notifications

userStories.title: Append Flow Backend — 3-Way Consent
userStories.description: As an open idea owner, I want to request appending to an in-review idea so my context can join an idea under review.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/ideas/:id/merge-request accepts merge_type='append' for in_review targets
Validates target has assigned reviewer (review_assignments.unassigned_at IS NULL)
POST /api/merge-requests/:id/consent accepts consent from target owner OR reviewer
All three consents='accepted' → status='accepted', publishes append.accepted
userStories.notes:
Architecture: data-model.md § merge_requests.reviewer_consent, review_assignments
Testing: integration-scenarios.md § Append Flow (F-5.4, F-5.5)
Files: gateway/apps/ideas/views.py, gateway/apps/similarity/views.py, test_append_flow.py
Gotchas: 3-way consent for append, 2-way for merge. Events: append_request.created, append.accepted, append.declined

userStories.title: Append Execution — Close & Collaborator Add
userStories.description: As system, execute append: close requesting idea, add owner as collaborator on target.
acceptanceCriteria: Updates requesting idea: closed_by_append_id = target_idea_id (state stays 'open')
Adds requesting owner to target collaborators
userStories.notes:
Architecture: data-model.md § ideas.closed_by_append_id, idea_collaborators
Files: core/apps/similarity/append_service.py (new), core/events/consumers.py
Gotchas: No new idea. State stays 'open', just flagged

userStories.title: Manual Merge — UUID/URL Entry
userStories.description: As owner, manually request merge via UUID/URL to recover from decline or request undetected merge.
acceptanceCriteria: Accepts target_idea_id (UUID) OR target_idea_url (extracts UUID from /idea/{uuid})
Auto-detects merge_type from target state (open/rejected→merge, in_review→append)
userStories.notes:
Architecture: data-model.md § merge_requests (add manual_request bool)
Testing: test-matrix.md § T-5.8.01-03, integration-scenarios.md § Manual Merge Recovery
Files: gateway/apps/ideas/views.py (extend), ManualMergeRequestSerializer, test_manual_merge.py, migration 0003_add_manual_request_flag.py
Gotchas: URL regex `/idea/([0-9a-f-]{36})/`. Bypasses dismissed pairs

userStories.title: Manual Merge UI — UUID/URL + Browse
userStories.description: As owner, manually request merge with UUID/URL input or similar ideas browser.
acceptanceCriteria: Tab 1: text input, paste button, client-side UUID validation, submit
Tab 2: GET /api/ideas/:id/similar, list with title+keywords, Request Merge buttons
Success: toast, modal closes, refresh idea
userStories.notes:
Design: component-specs.md § 17 Modal, § 4.1 Text Input
Files: frontend/components/workspace/ManualMergeModal.tsx, api/similarity.ts, __tests__/manual-merge-modal.test.tsx
Gotchas: UUID regex `/^[0-9a-f-]{36}$/i`. Clipboard API needs HTTPS/localhost

userStories.title: Recursive Merge — Co-Owner Demotion
userStories.description: As system, enforce 2-owner max: demote non-triggering co-owners when merged idea merges again.
acceptanceCriteria: Check if requesting/target idea has co_owner_id
Triggering owners (requesting + target) become co-owners of new idea
userStories.notes:
Architecture: data-model.md § ideas.co_owner_id, 2-owner model notes
Testing: integration-scenarios.md § Recursive Merge, runtime-safety.md § INTEGRITY-009
Files: core/apps/similarity/merge_service.py (extend execute_merge), test_recursive_merge.py
Gotchas: Triggerers = requesting owner + target owner. Demoted = all other original owners

userStories.title: Old Idea References — Read-Only Link
userStories.description: As user, see reference to merged/appended idea when viewing old idea.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/ideas/:id includes merged_idea_ref: {id, title, url} when closed_by_merge_id set
Includes appended_idea_ref: {id, title, url} when closed_by_append_id set
MergedIdeaBanner: 'This idea was merged. View merged idea: [link]'
AppendedIdeaBanner: 'This idea was appended. View target: [link]'
LockOverlay: chat+board read-only, message: 'This idea was merged/appended. Read-only.'
userStories.notes:
Design: component-specs.md § 11.5 Banners, § 5.8 LockOverlay
Files: gateway/apps/ideas/views.py (extend response), MergedIdeaBanner.tsx, AppendedIdeaBanner.tsx, IdeaWorkspace.tsx
Gotchas: merged_idea_ref and appended_idea_ref are mutually exclusive

userStories.title: Merge Notification Events — Wire All
userStories.description: As user, receive notifications for all merge/append events.
userStories.notes:
Architecture: api-design.md § Message Broker Events
Design: page-layouts.md § 12 Toast Notifications
Files: notification/consumers/similarity_events.py (extend), email/templates/merge_*.html, gateway/apps/websocket/routing.py
Gotchas: append_request.created notifies 2 parties. merge.complete notifies many
